The native will have only one'
brother (Mars in debilitation all alone) who will be in Government service
(Saturn in second to Mars in Leo--King's house).
With the Moon and Venus in thelsecond to the Sun, the native's father
will have been married twice .
. The native will have two daughters and one or two sons. One of the sons
will come up very well. About his 38th year, the native will own a house. He
will live upto 68-70 years of age.
CHART 336
This native will be one always in
a hurry. He will get perturbed easily.
Dh.
He will have trouble in his education
and will leave it incomplete. He will
have no happiness in any job he takes Moon
up. He will have to eke out livelihood
